title: dryopteris oreopteris
intro: Dryopteris oreopteris, also known as autumn fern, is a type of deciduous fern native to Europe and western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenes, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris oreopteris include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in traditional folk remedies for treating various ailments such as fever and respiratory issues.
